channel.title: Strands Agents Blog - Model-Driven
channel.description: Posts tagged with "Model-Driven" from the Strands Agents blog.

item.title: Strands Agents and the Model-Driven Approach
item.description: Learn how the model-driven approach in Strands Agents SDK lets modern LLMs drive their own behavior, making agents more resilient and adaptable.

item.title: Using Strands Agents with Claude 4 Interleaved Thinking
item.description: Learn how to use Claude 4's interleaved thinking beta feature with Strands Agents for faster, more fluid reasoning and reduced tool calls.
